title: Passenger Mission Earnings
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Reward), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS missions FROM MissionCompleted WHERE Name LIKE 'Mission_Passenger%' AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} Cr earned across {missions} completed passenger transport mission(s) during the report period. Passenger running in a well-fitted Beluga or Python is one of the steadiest credit generators available — a hefty earnings total validates the cabin outfitting investment and rewards the patience of serving the galaxy's demanding travellers.
details.help: MissionCompleted filtered to passenger mission name patterns. total drives the title as the total transport earnings.

tagLines: Passenger transport earnings compiled. Mission reward totals confirmed with the Pilots Federation mission board.
You flew them where they needed to go. Most of them kept their complaints to themselves.
A full passenger manifest and a long route is where the real earnings happen. You knew that.
